all.en: The whole office was decorated with twinkling lights and shiny silver ornaments.
all.zh: 整個辦公室都掛滿閃爍的燈飾和亮晶晶的銀色飾品。

all.en: Everyone showed up in festive sweaters, some uglier than others on purpose.
all.zh: 大家都穿著節慶毛衣前來，有些人還故意穿得特別醜。

all.en: The buffet table was loaded with roast chicken, dumplings, and homemade cookies.
all.zh: 自助餐桌上擺滿了烤雞、餃子和自製餅乾。

all.en: Our boss gave a short speech to thank everyone for a hardworking year.
all.zh: 老闆發表了一段簡短的演說，感謝大家辛苦工作了一年。

all.en: He then announced surprise bonuses, which made the room erupt in cheers.
all.zh: 他接著宣布意外的年終獎金，全場頓時歡呼起來。

all.en: We played a Secret Santa game, and I received a quirky coffee mug.
all.zh: 我們玩了交換禮物遊戲，我收到了一個造型古怪的咖啡杯。

all.en: The accountant, usually quiet, surprised us by singing karaoke very loudly.
all.zh: 平常很安靜的會計，竟然出乎意料地大聲唱起卡拉OK。

all.en: Some coworkers started dancing awkwardly to old pop hits.
all.zh: 幾位同事跟著老流行金曲笨拙地跳起舞來。

all.en: I chatted with people from departments I had never spoken to before.
all.zh: 我和一些從未交談過的部門同事聊起天來。

all.en: The intern won the costume contest with a hilarious reindeer outfit.
all.zh: 實習生憑藉一身爆笑的馴鹿裝贏得了服裝大賽。

all.en: As the night ended, I realized we were more than coworkers; we were a small family.
all.zh: 夜晚結束時，我體會到我們不僅是同事，更像是一個小家庭。

all.en: The following Monday, the office still smelled faintly of chocolate cookies and pine.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，辦公室裡仍隱約飄著巧克力餅乾與松木的香氣。

all.en: Photos from the party were posted on the company chat, and the laughter started all over.
all.zh: 派對的照片被貼上公司聊天群組，歡笑聲又從頭響了一次。

all.en: The intern's reindeer outfit became a popular meme that lasted for the rest of the year.
all.zh: 實習生的馴鹿裝成了一張熱門迷因，整個年度都還在被轉發。

all.en: My quirky coffee mug found a permanent home on the corner of my crowded desk.
all.zh: 我那只造型古怪的咖啡杯，從此固定擺在我擁擠的桌角上。

all.en: The accountant kept singing softly at her cubicle whenever the morning felt too quiet.
all.zh: 每當早晨太過安靜時，會計就會在自己的隔間裡輕聲哼唱。

all.en: Several of us started a weekly lunch group with people from the other departments.
all.zh: 幾位同事還和其他部門的人組成了每週一次的午餐聚會。

all.en: Our boss thanked us again in the next all-hands meeting and shared the new year's goals.
all.zh: 老闆在下一次全體會議上再次感謝我們，並分享了新一年的目標。

all.en: He reminded us that a strong team culture had helped us survive a difficult year.
all.zh: 他提醒大家，是堅實的團隊文化讓我們撐過了艱難的一年。

all.en: On New Year's Eve, many of us stayed late to watch the fireworks from the rooftop.
all.zh: 除夕夜，我們許多人留下來，從頂樓觀賞煙火。

all.en: Standing under the lights, I realized that work felt different when colleagues felt like home.
all.zh: 站在燈光下，我體會到當同事像家人一樣時，工作的感受也截然不同。
